* The artist required four distinct hues to finish the wall mural using forty eight small tiles.
* Each bottle covers ten tiles so the painter needed five containers for every single hue.
* The story brings joy to young minds who love history and creative expression.
* No harm exists in learning about the past or calculating simple numbers.
* The word level reads the same forward and backward in this text.
* The artist faced no hell in the seventh word of this sentence.
* Calculating needs helps us understand the effort behind great works of art.
